purpose: No-fix liveness; identity + seq16 only. Alive-bearing, non-position-bearing.
Minimal sample: WHO + WHERE + freshness. Core only with valid fix.
cadence_default: every beacon tick when position valid

purpose: Core-attached extension; qualifies one Core sample. Optional, loss-tolerant.
fields_included: payloadVersion, node_id, seq16, ref_core_seq16, posFlags (opt), sats (opt)

purpose: Static/config: maxSilence, hwProfileId, fwVersionId. Optional, loss-tolerant.
gating_rule: no CoreRef; MUST NOT send on every Operational
fields_included: payloadVersion, node_id, seq16, maxSilence10s (opt), hwProfileId (opt), fwVersionId (opt)

purpose: Dynamic runtime: battery, uptime. Optional, loss-tolerant.
